description: Contract governing the handoff of filtered constraint envelopes from the Constraint Filter Context to the Semantic Buffer Module.

intent_id.description: ID of the originating intent from IDE.

normalized_signal.description: Normalized signal text carried forward from IDE via CCE.

constraint_classes.description: Constraint class tags after CFC filtering. May be a subset of CCE output.

drift_score.description: Drift score carried forward from CCE.

veil_level.description: Veil operator level applied by CFC. 0 = no veil. 5 = maximum suppression.

filtered.description: True if CFC modified or suppressed any constraint classes from the CCE envelope.

filter_reason.description: Human-readable reason for filtering. Present only when filtered=true.

guarantees: intent_id references a valid IDE intent that passed CCE_CFC contract.
constraint_classes is present (may be empty array after filtering).
filter_reason is present if and only if filtered=true.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

VEIL_LEVEL_OUT_OF_RANGE.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Do not forward to SBM.

MISSING_FILTERED_FLAG.description: filtered field is absent or null.
MISSING_FILTERED_FLAG.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Do not forward to SBM.

VEIL_SUPPRESSION_WITHOUT_FLAG.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Inconsistent veil/filter state.

INVALID_INTENT_REFERENCE.description: intent_id does not reference a known CCE intent in the current session.
INVALID_INTENT_REFERENCE.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Do not forward to SBM.
